CVE-2018-1000036.title: In Artifex MuPDF 1.12.0 and earlier, multiple memory leaks in the ...
CVE-2018-1000036.summary: In Artifex MuPDF 1.12.0 and earlier, multiple memory leaks in the PDF parser allow an attacker to cause a denial of service (memory leak) via a crafted file.

CVE-2018-10289.title: In MuPDF 1.13.0, there is an infinite loop in the fz_skip_space f ...
CVE-2018-10289.summary: In MuPDF 1.13.0, there is an infinite loop in the fz_skip_space function of the pdf/pdf-xref.c file. A remote adversary could leverage this vulnerability to cause a denial of service via a crafted pdf file.

CVE-2018-16647.title: In Artifex MuPDF 1.13.0, the pdf_get_xref_entry function in pdf/p ...
CVE-2018-16647.summary: In Artifex MuPDF 1.13.0, the pdf_get_xref_entry function in pdf/pdf-xref.c allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (segmentation fault in fz_write_data in fitz/output.c) via a crafted pdf file.

CVE-2018-16648.title: In Artifex MuPDF 1.13.0, the fz_append_byte function in fitz/buff ...
CVE-2018-16648.summary: In Artifex MuPDF 1.13.0, the fz_append_byte function in fitz/buffer.c allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (segmentation fault) via a crafted pdf file. This is caused by a pdf/pdf-device.c pdf_dev_alpha array-index underflow.

CVE-2018-18662.title: There is an out-of-bounds read in fz_run_t3_glyph in fitz/font.c  ...
CVE-2018-18662.summary: There is an out-of-bounds read in fz_run_t3_glyph in fitz/font.c in Artifex MuPDF 1.14.0, as demonstrated by mutool.

CVE-2018-19882.title: In Artifex MuPDF 1.14.0, the svg_run_image function in svg/svg-ru ...
CVE-2018-19882.summary: In Artifex MuPDF 1.14.0, the svg_run_image function in svg/svg-run.c allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (href_att NULL pointer dereference and application crash) via a crafted svg file, as demonstrated by mupdf-gl.

CVE-2020-16600.title: A Use After Free vulnerability exists in Artifex Software, Inc. M ...
CVE-2020-16600.summary: A Use After Free vulnerability exists in Artifex Software, Inc. MuPDF library 1.17.0-rc1 and earlier when a valid page was followed by a page with invalid pixmap dimensions, causing bander - a static - to point to previously freed memory instead of a newband_writer.

CVE-2020-19609.title: Artifex MuPDF before 1.18.0 has a heap based buffer over-write in ...
CVE-2020-19609.summary: Artifex MuPDF before 1.18.0 has a heap based buffer over-write in tiff_expand_colormap() function when parsing TIFF files allowing attackers to cause a denial of service.

CVE-2020-21896.title: A Use After Free vulnerability in svg_dev_text_span_as_paths_defs ...
CVE-2020-21896.summary: A Use After Free vulnerability in svg_dev_text_span_as_paths_defs function in source/fitz/svg-device.c in Artifex Software MuPDF 1.16.0 allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service via opening of a crafted PDF file.

CVE-2020-26519.title: Artifex MuPDF before 1.18.0 has a heap based buffer over-write wh ...
CVE-2020-26519.summary: Artifex MuPDF before 1.18.0 has a heap based buffer over-write when parsing JBIG2 files allowing attackers to cause a denial of service.

CVE-2020-26683.title: A memory leak issue discovered in /pdf/pdf-font-add.c in Artifex  ...
CVE-2020-26683.summary: A memory leak issue discovered in /pdf/pdf-font-add.c in Artifex Software MuPDF 1.17.0 allows attackers to obtain sensitive information.

CVE-2021-3407.title: A flaw was found in mupdf 1.18.0. Double free of object during li ...
CVE-2021-3407.summary: A flaw was found in mupdf 1.18.0. Double free of object during linearization may lead to memory corruption and other potential consequences.

CVE-2021-37220.title: MuPDF through 1.18.1 has an out-of-bounds write because the cache ...
CVE-2021-37220.summary: MuPDF through 1.18.1 has an out-of-bounds write because the cached color converter does not properly consider the maximum key size of a hash table. This can, for example, be seen with crafted "mutool draw" input.

CVE-2021-4216.title: A Floating point exception (division-by-zero) flaw was found in M ...
CVE-2021-4216.summary: A Floating point exception (division-by-zero) flaw was found in Mupdf for zero width pages in muraster.c. It is fixed in Mupdf-1.20.0-rc1 upstream.

CVE-2023-51103.title: A floating point exception (divide-by-zero) vulnerability was dis ...
CVE-2023-51103.summary: A floating point exception (divide-by-zero) vulnerability was discovered in Artifex MuPDF 1.23.4 in the function fz_new_pixmap_from_float_data() of pixmap.c.

CVE-2023-51104.title: A floating point exception (divide-by-zero) vulnerability was dis ...
CVE-2023-51104.summary: A floating point exception (divide-by-zero) vulnerability was discovered in Artifex MuPDF 1.23.4 in function pnm_binary_read_image() of load-pnm.c when span equals zero.

CVE-2023-51105.title: A floating point exception (divide-by-zero) vulnerability was dis ...
CVE-2023-51105.summary: A floating point exception (divide-by-zero) vulnerability was discovered in Artifex MuPDF 1.23.4 in function bmp_decompress_rle4() of load-bmp.c.

CVE-2023-51106.title: A floating point exception (divide-by-zero) vulnerability was dis ...
CVE-2023-51106.summary: A floating point exception (divide-by-zero) vulnerability was discovered in mupdf 1.23.4 in function pnm_binary_read_image() of load-pnm.c when fz_colorspace_n returns zero.

CVE-2023-51107.title: A floating point exception (divide-by-zero) vulnerability was dis ...
CVE-2023-51107.summary: A floating point exception (divide-by-zero) vulnerability was discovered in Artifex MuPDF 1.23.4 in functon compute_color() of jquant2.c. NOTE: this is disputed by the supplier because there was not reasonable evidence to determine the existence of a vulnerability or identify the affected product.

CVE-2024-24259.summary: freeglut through 3.4.0 was discovered to contain a memory leak via the menuEntry variable in the glutAddMenuEntry function.

CVE-2025-46206.summary: An issue in Artifex mupdf 1.25.6, 1.25.5 allows a remote attacker to cause a denial of service via an infinite recursion in the `mutool clean` utility.
